---
title: "Plot a GPX Files"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Plot a GPX Files}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(plotgpx)
results <- plotgpx("/Users/ad26693/Desktop/2015-09-19-MAYO-AV31424-GPS-PP15-EXTRACT-15-WINDOW-120_with_speed_m_per_min.gpx")
```
